text: I attack and my friends defend.
The team does not lose often.
Hi Estephano! Do you want to join our game night?
Yes! I love games. I am a strong player. What is the plan?
We make two teams. You attack, and your friends defend.
Perfect. What happens if we lose a match?
No problem! It is just for fun. The best score wins a small prize.
Great! Let us win together. See you on Friday!
We sometimes lose, but it is okay.
I check my score and my level.

Hi, this is Estephano. I am a tech student, and I love video games. My favorite game is online, so I play with my team. In the game, I am a strong player. I usually attack the enemy and my friends defend the base. When we work together, we win the match. Of course, we sometimes lose, but that is okay. After a good game, I always check my score and my level. Last week, I finished level ten! Gaming is fun, and it is also great practice for my English, because the game is in English!

Hello, this is Sara from the Game Club. I call about our game night this Friday. Here is the plan. First, we make two teams of four players. Then we play three matches. Remember: when you attack, your friends defend. The team with the best score wins a small prize. Do not worry if you lose -- it is just for fun. Bring your headphones and a good mood. See you on Friday, and let's win together!

Estephano plays one match with his team. First, he opens the game and joins his team. Then he chooses his character. Next, he attacks the enemy. After that, his friends defend the base. Finally, the team wins the match and Estephano checks his new score.
I attack and my friends defend.
I check my score and my level.
We sometimes lose, but it is okay.
